name: Spain (naval jack)

colors.symbolism: the field of Castile, the pales of Aragon, and the field of Navarre
the gold of the Castilian castle and Aragonese pales

description: A square flag quartered: the gold castle of Castile on red in the first and fourth quarters, the purple lion of Leon on white in the second and third, with the gold-on-red pales of Aragon as a central inescutcheon.
history: Adopted on 28 May 1785 by King Charles III as the war ensign and jack of the Spanish Royal Navy.

features.role: Castles of Castile in the 1st and 4th quarters
Lions of Leon in the 2nd and 3rd quarters
